summary: EXP-465 (RE-AUTHORED — phantom-resolution rescue of previous run) addresses HOL-REDUNDANCY c2 Hole 4 via two patches. P0 adds a 140-word hub-designation paragraph to §2b.6 designating §4.2.4/§4.2.5 as the canonical home for the (baseline × coverage × geometry-weight) arithmetic. P1 collapses §9.2 first paragraph by ~30 words. ANALYST OVERRIDE of curmudgeon's §2b.6-as-hub recommendation in favor of §4.2 (event-physics over scoring-rule). review_class=deep-attack to ensure curmudgeon-on-rewrite re-review. Deferred items in §6.14, §8.16, §8b.3 routed to follow-up EXPs (coordinate §8b.3 with EXP-462 integration).
rescue_note: Previous analyst run at 2026-05-31T01:21:35.336Z claimed to author EXP-465 in latest-analysis-summary.txt but no EXP file was actually written. This is the PR-1 phantom-resolution pattern. Re-authored from documented plan; attention-inbox notice also being filed for tinker.
